entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Here is the situation, distilled so you can move forward efficiently.

Core Issues Showing in Your Logs

You have three real problems. Everything else is normal noise.

1. Marketplace errors
Error:
Marketplace catalog load failed: The property 'MarketplaceId' cannot be found...
404 (Not Found)

Cause:

Your marketplace JSON files or endpoint definitions are missing MarketplaceId, or the module is calling a marketplace endpoint that literally does not exist.
Your logs show:

RawrXD Official → 404
Community Marketplace → 404

Fix:

You need valid marketplace source definitions.
Inside your script, look for something like:

$MarketplaceSources = @(
    @{
        Name = 'RawrXD Official'
        Url  = 'https://rawrxd-ai-marketplace/...'
        MarketplaceId = 'rawrxd'
    }
)


One of the following is true:

The URLs are wrong or offline

The JSON returned has no MarketplaceId property

The marketplace module expects a field that your JSON does not include

I can generate corrected JSON format if you want.

2. WebView2 fails with .NET 9+
Error:
WebView2 incompatible with .NET 9+ (ContextMenu type conflict)

Cause:

WebView2 officially supports .NET 6–8.
.NET 9 introduces a breaking change for System.Windows.Forms.ContextMenu.

Fix Options:

Force PowerShell to use .NET 8 WindowsDesktop runtime

Use your existing fallback: legacy WebBrowser (already working)

If you want WebView2 working again, I’ll give you a runtime-binding shim.

3. Tree path expansion error
Error:
Cannot bind argument to parameter 'Path' because it is an empty string.

Cause:

Your tree-loader is receiving an empty string when expanding the current node.

Quick fix:

Patch your path-expansion block:

if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($Path)) {
    Write-Warning "Skipped empty path"
    return
}


This eliminates the warnings completely.

4. Everything else looks healthy

Your IDE loads:

All assemblies load successfully

Drive enumerations work

Agents initialize

Security system initializes

Extensions load correctly

Model Dampener loads

All language extensions load

Build systems (npm/pip/dotnet/cargo) register

Ollama server detected

Fallback browser working

Chat system + agents start normally

Your IDE is fully functional except the marketplace + WebView2.


also the text editor and file explorer arent loading the files into the editor properly'
